title: Founding Backend Engineer
description:
**About Harness** 




  





 Harness is building the AI\\-native commercial insurance brokerage.
 



  





 Commercial insurance is a $1T\\+ market, but the brokerage layer still runs on manual judgment, fragmented workflows, and tribal knowledge.
 



  





 The best brokers know how to evaluate risk, identify the right markets, prepare a strong submission, negotiate better outcomes, and guide customers through complexity. That expertise is powerful, but it is hard to scale.
 



  





 Harness is building the intelligence layer for modern brokerage.
 



  





 We are building AI assistants for commercial insurance, a domain where reliability, judgment, and task completion matter. Our systems are designed to understand context, reason through workflows, take action, and help move real brokerage work forward.
 



  





 Harness started in Jan, 2026\\. In five months, we grew 100x and reached $1M ARR. We are well\\-funded and still very early.
 



  





**The Problem** 




  





 Every business needs insurance, but commercial insurance is still slow, opaque, and operationally heavy.
 



  





 A single account can involve multiple coverage lines, underwriting variables, fragmented carrier rules, pricing differences, state\\-specific requirements, documents, follow\\-ups, compliance steps, and negotiation. The hard part is not just collecting data \\- the hard part is knowing what to do next, what matters, and how to get the best outcome.
 



  





 Traditional brokerage solves this with experienced people.
 



  





 Harness is building AI systems that scale that expertise.
 



  





**The Thesis** 




  





 The next great insurance brokerage will not look like a traditional brokerage with a better CRM.
 



  





 It will be built around AI assistants that understand context, make decisions, take action, and continuously improve from real workflows. Humans will still matter, but they should focus on judgment, relationships, exceptions, and customer outcomes \\- not repetitive coordination, document prep, follow\\-ups, and manual routing.
 



  





 To build this, we need engineers who understand that backend systems are not just APIs and databases. They are the foundation for reliable AI execution: state, context, permissions, workflow logic, action history, decisioning, and operational control.
 



  





**The Role** 




  





 We are hiring a Founding Backend Engineer to architect, build, and scale the AI\\-first platform behind Harness.
 



  





 You will work directly with the founders and operators to turn complex brokerage workflows into reliable backend systems and AI\\-powered products. You will not be handed polished specs. You will be expected to understand the business, talk to users, reason from first principles, design the architecture, ship quickly, and measure whether your work moved the business.
 



  





 Your work will directly impact producer productivity, quote speed, placement quality, customer experience, and revenue growth.
 



  





**What We’re Looking For** 




  




* 3–7 years of strong backend engineering experience
* Strong proficiency in Python, Node.js, Java, Go, or similar
* Experience building AI agents, workflow automation, or LLM\\-powered products
* Strong use of AI coding tools like Cursor, Claude Code, ChatGPT, or similar
* Strong understanding of backend architecture, APIs, services, queues, and databases
* Experience with PostgreSQL or another relational database
* Ability to design clean data models for complex business workflows
* Experience building production systems end\\-to\\-end
* Strong debugging and system design skills
* Ability to operate without detailed specs
* First\\-principles thinking
* Ability to talk to non\\-technical users and translate workflows into software
* High ownership, high agency, and strong taste for simple systems

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Eurofins Scientific is an international life sciences company, providing a unique range of analytical testing services to clients across multiple industries, to make life and the environment safer, healthier and more sustainable. From the food you eat to the medicines you rely on, Eurofins works with the biggest companies in the world to ensure the products they supply are safe, their ingredients are authentic and labelling is accurate. Eurofins is a global leader in food, environmental, pharmaceutical and cosmetic product testing and in agroscience CRO services. It is also one of the global independent market leaders in certain testing and laboratory services for genomics, discovery pharmacology, forensics, CDMO, advanced material sciences and in the support of clinical studies.
   

  





 In over just 35 years, Eurofins has grown from one laboratory in Nantes, France to 62,000 staff across a network of over 1,000 independent companies in 61 countries, operating 900 laboratories. Performing over 450 million tests every year, Eurofins offers a portfolio of over 200,000 analytical methods to evaluate the safety, identity, composition, authenticity, origin, traceability and purity of biological substances and products, as well as providing innovative clinical diagnostic testing services, as one of the leading global emerging players in specialised clinical diagnostics testing.
   

  





 Eurofins is one of the fastest growing listed European companies with a listing on the French stock exchange since 1997\\.
   

  





 Eurofins IT Solutions India Pvt Ltd (EITSI) is a fully owned subsidiary of Eurofins and functions as a Global Software Delivery Center exclusively catering to Eurofins Global IT business needs. The code shipped out of EITSI impacts the global network of Eurofins labs and services.
   

  





 The primary focus at EITSI is to develop the next generation LIMS (Lab Information Management system), Customer portals, e\\-commerce solutions, ERP/CRM system, Mobile Apps \\& other B2B platforms for various Eurofins Laboratories and businesses. Young and dynamic, we have a rich culture and we offer fulfilling careers.
   

  





  

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Senior Software Engineer – Full Stack (.NET \\+ Angular \\+ SQL \\+ Azure)
   

  

 Experience: 4–7 Years

 Additional Information
   

  

 Applicants must be currently authorized to work in India on a full\\-time basis. This position does not offer sponsorship for employment visa status or work permit now or in the future.
   

  

 I n return for your expertise, we offer opportunities for growth, career development, and a competitive compensation and benefits package—all within an innovative and collaborative work environment.
   

  

 Are you ready to help us transform the payments ecosystem? To learn more about ACI Worldwide, visit our web site at www.aciworldwide.com
   

 ACI Worldwide is an AA/EEO employer in the United States, which includes providing equal opportunity for protected veterans and individuals with disabilities, and an EEO employer globally.
   

  

 Important Notice About Recruitment Scams
   

 Job seekers should be aware of ongoing recruitment scams where individuals or organizations impersonate legitimate companies to offer fake job opportunities. Please be cautious and verify any communications claiming to be from our company ( www.aciworldwide.com / @aciworldwide.com). The ACI Worldwide recruitment team will always follow official channels and will never request payment.

Familiarity with containerization tools like Docker and Kubernetes, and knowledge of DevOps practices including automation, infrastructure as code, and continuous monitoring.

Performing over 450 million tests every year, Eurofins offers a portfolio of over 200,000 analytical methods to evaluate the safety, identity, composition, authenticity, origin, traceability and purity of biological substances and products, as well as providing innovative clinical diagnostic testing services, as one of the leading global emerging players in specialised clinical diagnostics testing.

**About Company**
 Applied Materials, Inc. is the global leader in materials engineering solutions for the semiconductor, flat panel display and solar photovoltaic (PV) industries. Our technologies help make innovations like smartphones, flat screen TVs and solar panels more affordable and accessible to consumers and businesses around the world.
